source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1924 photograph)
title: Columbia Glacier, from Heather Island
description: 1899 Curtis photograph from the Harriman Alaska Expedition showing Columbia Glacier seen from Heather Island in Prince William Sound — the same fjord system that contains College Fjord. A dominant hemlock tree frames the composition, looking west toward the glacier in the distance.
alt: Historical 1899 photograph of Columbia Glacier seen from Heather Island, Prince William Sound, with a dominant hemlock tree in the foreground
